mechanism_narrative: A 5% YoY growth in real GDP signals a robust expansion in aggregate demand that boosts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5% YoY growth in real GDP does not correlate with positive 5-day forward returns in > 50% of instances over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY decline in industrial production signals a supply-side shock that compresses profit margins and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 10% YoY decline in industrial production does not correlate with negative 20-day forward returns in > 60% of instances over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 50-bp cut in the federal funds rate signals a monetary easing cycle that boosts equity valuations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 50-bp cut in the federal funds rate does not correlate with positive 60-day forward returns in > 70% of instances over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% YoY rise in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that boosts wage growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 0.5% YoY rise in the unemployment rate does not correlate with positive 20-day forward returns in > 55% of instances over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY growth in real disposable personal income signals a robust expansion in aggregate demand that boosts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 10% YoY growth in real disposable personal income does not correlate with positive 5-day forward returns in > 50% of instances over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 5% YoY decline in housing starts signals a supply-side shock that compresses profit margins and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 5% YoY decline in housing starts does not correlate with negative 20-day forward returns in > 60% of instances over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 25-bp rise in the federal funds rate signals a monetary tightening cycle that boosts risk-free rates and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 25-bp rise in the federal funds rate does not correlate with negative 60-day forward returns in > 70% of instances over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% YoY fall in the unemployment rate signals a loosening labor market that boosts wage growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 0.5% YoY fall in the unemployment rate does not correlate with positive 20-day forward returns in > 55% of instances over any 2-year rolling window.
